name: Pasta Twists with Italian Meat Sauce
recipeIngredient: 1 Pound pkg. Green Giant Pasta Accents Garden Herb
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large skillet over medium-high heat, brown the ground beef and onion until no longer pink.
2. Drain any excess fat from the pan.
3. Stir in the frozen vegetables with the pasta and spaghetti sauce.
4. Bring the mixture to a boil.
5. Reduce the heat to medium and cover the pan. Cook for 10 to 12 minutes, or until the vegetables are crisp-tender, stirring occasionally.
6. Sprinkle with shredded mozzarella cheese before serving.
